title: Form is not changing after I change the columns
excerpt: I have managed to set up a Legal Request form on monday which has populated the Main table board with a list of all the requests. (The form was created first). I would like to re-order the columns so I tried to move the …

posts.author: cmohrmann (Christine Mohrmann)
posts.cookedHtml: I have managed to set up a Legal Request form on monday which has populated the Main table board with a list of all the requests. (The form was created first). I would like to re-order the columns so I tried to move the questions on the request form, but it didn’t work. Is there another solution?

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml: Does clicking and dragging the columns in the main table view achieve what you are looking for? I believe doing this shouldn’t change the order of the questions if you’d like to keep them as is in the form.

posts.author: dominicw (Dominic)
posts.cookedHtml: Might be worth trying Monday + Fillout (form builder that integrates natively with Monday and is free for 1000 submissions/mo). Hope that helps!
